channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Jensen Huang just used his first ever X post to warn the AI industry not to make the mistake that software narrowly avoided in the 1980s
item.description: Xi Jinping has called for "openness" and "a symphony of global cooperation," and it seems that Jensen Huang agrees.

item.title: Nvidia, Microsoft lead call for open-weight AI models after Kimi
item.description: A coalition of tech firms led by Nvidia and Microsoft called on policymakers to promote the development of open-weight artificial intelligence models.

item.title: Anthropic’s head of economics just explained why Anthropic’s CEO was wrong about a white-collar bloodbath
item.description: We've been hearing about doomsday, but Peter McCrory writes we "don’t see significant impact of AI on the U.S. labor market."

item.title: Canada celebrates new Detroit River bridge connecting Ontario to Michigan as 50% tariff feud keeps American officials away
item.description: Ottawa canceled a joint ceremony after Trump announced 50% tariffs on Canadian goods, highlighting strains between the two trading partners.
